---
# EXECUTION-SPEC EXEC-084
# Generated by build-pipeline (streamlined path — lead-architect single-pass)
# PRD: docs/10-prd/PRD-084-pilot-sandbox-demo-routing.md
# FIB-H: docs/issues/gaps/pilot-auth-containment/FIB-H-SIGNIN-RUNTIME-ENTRY-001.md
# FIB-S: not loaded (no structured_ref in PRD frontmatter — PRD-only mode)

id: EXEC-084
prd: PRD-084
prd_title: "Pilot Sandbox Demo Routing"
service: PilotContainmentService (runtime entry separation)
mvp_phase: pilot-containment
status: Draft
date: 2026-05-18

# Intake Authority Chain
fib_h: docs/issues/gaps/pilot-auth-containment/FIB-H-SIGNIN-RUNTIME-ENTRY-001.md
fib_s_loaded: false

# GOV-010 waiver: scaffold_ref + adr_refs absent from PRD-084 frontmatter.
# ADRs verified via PRD §5.2 body refs (SRM, SEC-001, SEC-002). No new ADRs required.
# This slice is pure routing + guard logic — no schema, RLS, or new service boundary.
# Waiver: ADRs-verified-in-body; same waiver pattern as EXEC-083.
gov010_check: "waived:ADRs-verified-in-body"

# Complexity: Streamlined — no migrations, no RLS, no SECURITY DEFINER,
# no new bounded contexts, no new API surfaces, 4 implementation workstreams.
complexity_prescreen: streamlined

# Write-path: staff INSERT in /start server component (WS_GATEWAY). WS_E2E auto-injected.
write_path_classification: detected

adr_refs:
  - docs/80-adrs/ADR-024_DECISIONS.md
  - docs/80-adrs/ADR-030-auth-system-hardening.md

workstreams:
  WS_GATEWAY:
    name: "/start Gateway Update — Auto-Binding + Routing Table"
    type: routing
    bounded_context: pilot-containment
    description: >
      Rewrite the approved non-admin branch in app/(public)/start/page.tsx to
      eliminate the casino-settings check and the /register / /bootstrap redirect
      branches. Replace the "no staff" fallback with idempotent Casino 1 demo staff
      binding creation.

      The resulting approved-user routing table:
        staff query error               → /signin?error=service_unavailable (unchanged)
        active staff row                → /pit (unchanged)
        no staff row, idempotency OK    → INSERT demo staff binding
          insert success                → /pit
          insert error                  → /signin?error=service_unavailable

      INSERT spec: casino_id = DEMO_CASINO_ID constant
      ('ca000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'), role = 'pit_boss',
      employee_id = 'DEMO-{randomUUID().substring(0,6).toUpperCase()}',
      user_id = user.id, email = canonicalizeEmail(user.email!).

      Idempotency check: query staff WHERE casino_id = DEMO_CASINO_ID AND
      user_id = user.id before INSERT. If row found, skip INSERT, redirect /pit.

      Uses the service-role client for the INSERT (allowlist already uses it).
      Does NOT call set_rls_context_from_staff or any RLS context-injection RPC.

      Removals: casino_settings query, settingsError handler, setup_status check,
      onboarding_registration query, /register and /bootstrap redirect branches,
      inactive-staff branch (no longer needed once direct-to-pit is the only outcome).

      Retentions: auth check → /signin, allowlist gate → /request-access,
      admin shortcut → /pilot-review, staff binding query, active-staff → /pit,
      staffError → /signin?error=service_unavailable.
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: []
    outputs:
      - app/(public)/start/page.tsx
      - app/(public)/start/__tests__/start-gateway.test.ts
    gate: test-pass
    estimated_complexity: small
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "Unauthenticated → /signin"
      - "Not approved → /request-access"
      - "Admin (in PILOT_ADMIN_EMAILS) → /pilot-review"
      - "Approved + active staff row → /pit (no INSERT attempted)"
      - "Approved + no staff row + INSERT succeeds → /pit"
      - "Approved + no staff row + INSERT fails → /signin?error=service_unavailable"
      - "Idempotency: second sign-in finds existing DEMO- row → no INSERT → /pit"
      - "set_rls_context_from_staff never called"
      - "casino_settings table not referenced"
      - "No redirect to /register or /bootstrap"

  WS_DEMO:
    name: "/demo Entry Route — Defense-in-Depth Holding Page"
    type: routing
    bounded_context: pilot-containment
    description: >
      New async server component at app/(public)/demo/page.tsx.

      This route is NOT a normal destination for approved evaluators. The auto-binding
      in /start routes approved evaluators to /pit before /demo is ever reached.
      This route handles direct URL navigation and the edge case where a user's staff
      binding has been revoked after approval.

      Auth check sequence (strict order):
        1. supabase.auth.getUser() → no user         → redirect /signin
        2. checkAllowlistGate(...) → not_approved     → redirect /request-access
        3. PILOT_ADMIN_EMAILS check → admin           → redirect /pilot-review
        4. staff binding query → active row           → redirect /pit
        5. approved non-admin + no active staff row   → render holding page

      Staff query failure: emit a structured diagnostic (must not include evaluator
      email in plaintext), fall back to holding page for approved non-admin users.
      Do not crash or return 500.

      Holding page layout: heading "Demo Access Pending", one sentence of subtext,
      Link href="/contact" CTA "Contact us". No state mutation.

      Invariants (hard):
        - No INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE under any code path
        - No call to set_rls_context_from_staff or any RLS context-injection RPC
        - No RPC calls of any kind
        - Holding page renders even if staff query fails
    executor: frontend-design-pt-2
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: []
    outputs:
      - app/(public)/demo/page.tsx
      - app/(public)/demo/__tests__/demo-page.test.ts
    gate: test-pass
    estimated_complexity: small
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "Unauthenticated → redirect /signin"
      - "Not-approved authenticated → redirect /request-access"
      - "Admin user → redirect /pilot-review"
      - "Active staff user (direct navigation) → redirect /pit"
      - "Approved non-admin + no staff row → holding page rendered"
      - "Staff query failure → holding page rendered + structured diagnostic emitted (no raw email)"
      - "No INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE under any branch"
      - "No call to set_rls_context_from_staff"

  WS_GUARDS:
    name: "Production Setup Containment Guards"
    type: service
    bounded_context: pilot-containment
    description: >
      Extend requireApprovedPilotSession to accept an options object
      { requireProvisioningAuth?: boolean } (default false).

      When requireProvisioningAuth: true, the guard adds a PILOT_ADMIN_EMAILS check
      AFTER the allowlist gate. Fail-closed rule: if PILOT_ADMIN_EMAILS env var is
      unset or resolves to an empty list, throw FORBIDDEN — no provisioning access
      granted. Pilot admins must be BOTH allowlisted AND in PILOT_ADMIN_EMAILS.

      Default behavior (requireProvisioningAuth: false or omitted) is unchanged:
      requires authenticated session + active allowlist entry. No breaking change.

      Wire the updated guard into all four surfaces using requireProvisioningAuth: true:
        register/page.tsx: after allowlist, approved non-admin → redirect /demo.
          Pilot admin (allowlisted + PILOT_ADMIN_EMAILS) → proceed to RegisterForm.
          Dev bypass behavior unchanged.
        bootstrap/page.tsx: same guard; approved non-admin → redirect /demo.
          Remove the casino_id claims-based short-circuit (it assumed operational
          session, not applicable here).
        registerCompanyAction: call guard { requireProvisioningAuth: true }; on
          FORBIDDEN return { ok:false, code:'FORBIDDEN', ... } without calling
          registerCompany. Mutation never invoked on rejection.
        bootstrapAction: same guard; on FORBIDDEN return FORBIDDEN without calling
          bootstrapCasino. Mutation never invoked on rejection.

      All four surfaces must import and call the same helper with the same option.
      The shared helper is the single source of truth for this authorization rule.
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: []
    outputs:
      - lib/server-actions/guards/require-approved-pilot-session.ts
      - app/(onboarding)/register/page.tsx
      - app/(onboarding)/bootstrap/page.tsx
      - app/(onboarding)/register/_actions.ts
      - app/(onboarding)/bootstrap/_actions.ts
      - lib/server-actions/guards/__tests__/require-approved-pilot-session.test.ts
    gate: test-pass
    estimated_complexity: medium
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "requireApprovedPilotSession() (no opts) behavior unchanged"
      - "requireApprovedPilotSession({ requireProvisioningAuth: true }) → FORBIDDEN for approved non-admin"
      - "requireApprovedPilotSession({ requireProvisioningAuth: true }) → passes for allowlisted PILOT_ADMIN_EMAILS member"
      - "PILOT_ADMIN_EMAILS unset + requireProvisioningAuth:true → FORBIDDEN (fail closed)"
      - "Non-allowlisted email in PILOT_ADMIN_EMAILS → FORBIDDEN (allowlist gate runs first)"
      - "/register page redirects approved non-admin to /demo"
      - "/bootstrap page redirects approved non-admin to /demo"
      - "/register page allows allowlisted pilot admin"
      - "/bootstrap page allows allowlisted pilot admin"
      - "registerCompanyAction returns FORBIDDEN for approved non-admin; registerCompany not called"
      - "bootstrapAction returns FORBIDDEN for approved non-admin; bootstrapCasino not called"
      - "All four surfaces use same helper + same option"

  WS_LANDING:
    name: "Landing Page CTA Updates"
    type: frontend
    bounded_context: landing
    description: >
      Update three CTA locations in app/(landing)/page.tsx:

      Location 1 — Line 271 (hero primary button):
        Before: <Link href="/contact">Request an operational walkthrough</Link>
        After:  <Link href="/signin">Explore Interactive Demo</Link>

      Location 2 — Line 279 (hero secondary button):
        Before: <a href="#operations">Explore operational domains</a>
        After:  <Link href="/request-access">Request Production Pilot</Link>
        (Change <a> to <Link> for Next.js consistency.)

      Location 3 — Line 604 (bottom close CTA, mirrors hero primary):
        Before: <Link href="/contact">Request an operational walkthrough</Link>
        After:  <Link href="/signin">Explore Interactive Demo</Link>

      No other changes to the landing page. No structural changes.
    executor: frontend-design-pt-2
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: []
    outputs:
      - app/(landing)/page.tsx
    gate: build
    estimated_complexity: trivial
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "Hero primary CTA text: 'Explore Interactive Demo', href: /signin"
      - "Hero secondary CTA text: 'Request Production Pilot', href: /request-access"
      - "Bottom close CTA text: 'Explore Interactive Demo', href: /signin"

  WS_E2E:
    name: "E2E Write-Path Tests — Demo Staff Auto-Binding"
    type: testing
    bounded_context: pilot-containment
    description: >
      Playwright specs for the auto-binding write path in /start (E2E mandate —
      write path detected).

      Critical flows:
        1. Happy path: approved evaluator with no prior staff binding signs in via
           magic link → /auth/confirm → /start → staff INSERT → lands on /pit.
        2. Idempotency: approved evaluator signs in a second time → existing DEMO-
           staff row found → no INSERT → lands on /pit.
        3. Regression: existing staff-bound user signs in → /pit directly (existing
           staff binding used, no DEMO- INSERT path triggered).

      Out of scope: /demo holding page (no seeded DB state to set up for
      revoked-access path), containment guard rejections (unit-tested in WS_GUARDS).
    executor: e2e-testing
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS_GATEWAY, WS_DEMO, WS_GUARDS]
    outputs:
      - e2e/pilot-auth/demo-routing.spec.ts
    gate: e2e-write-path
    estimated_complexity: medium

execution_phases:
  - phase: 1
    name: Core Routing + Guards
    parallel: [WS_GATEWAY, WS_DEMO, WS_GUARDS]
    description: >
      Gateway update, /demo route, and setup containment guards are all independent
      (different files). Run in parallel.

  - phase: 2
    name: Landing Page CTAs
    parallel: [WS_LANDING]
    description: >
      CTA-only change to landing page. Independent of phase 1 outcomes, but lower
      priority (P1 vs P0). Run after phase 1 to keep focus.

  - phase: 3
    name: E2E Write-Path Validation
    parallel: [WS_E2E]
    description: >
      Playwright E2E tests for the auto-binding write path. Depends on phase 1
      workstreams being complete.

gates:
  test-pass:
    description: Unit tests pass for all affected workstream outputs
    commands:
      - "npm run test -- --testPathPattern='start-gateway|demo-page|require-approved-pilot-session|register-containment|bootstrap-containment' > /tmp/test-output.log 2>&1"

  build:
    description: Next.js build succeeds with no type errors
    commands:
      - "npm run type-check > /tmp/typecheck.log 2>&1"
      - "npm run build > /tmp/build.log 2>&1"

  e2e-write-path:
    description: Playwright E2E specs for auto-binding write path pass
    commands:
      - "npx playwright test e2e/pilot-auth/ --reporter=list > /tmp/e2e-output.log 2>&1"

  type-check:
    description: TypeScript strict check passes
    commands:
      - "npm run type-check > /tmp/typecheck.log 2>&1"

---

# EXEC-084 — Pilot Sandbox Demo Routing

## Overview

This execution spec closes the sandbox isolation gap left by PRD-083. Three surfaces
are modified and one is created:

1. **`/start` gateway** — strips the casino-settings check and setup-redirect branches.
   Approved users without a staff binding now get an auto-created Casino 1 demo staff
   binding and land on `/pit` directly. Idempotent on repeat sign-ins.

2. **`/demo` route** (new) — defense-in-depth edge case handler. Not reached during
   normal approved-user sign-in (auto-binding at `/start` routes to `/pit` first).
   Handles direct URL navigation and revoked-access scenarios with a holding page.
   Read-only: no DB writes under any path.

3. **Production setup guards** — `requireApprovedPilotSession` gains a
   `requireProvisioningAuth` option that adds an admin check. All four setup surfaces
   (`/register`, `/bootstrap`, `registerCompanyAction`, `bootstrapAction`) use it to
   fail closed for approved non-admin users.

4. **Landing page CTAs** — hero primary and bottom close CTA updated to drive
   sign-in; secondary CTA updated to drive pilot access request.

## Prerequisite

PRD-083 (`services/pilot/`, `checkAllowlistGate`, `approved_email_allowlist` table,
`require-approved-pilot-session.ts`) must be merged and deployed. The seeded Casino 1
(`ca000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001`) must exist in the target environment.

## Security Invariants (non-negotiable)

- `/demo` writes nothing to any table.
- `/demo` calls no RLS context-injection function.
- `/start` auto-binding does not call `set_rls_context_from_staff`.
- `registerCompanyAction` and `bootstrapAction` never call their respective service
  functions when the provisioning authorization guard rejects.
- `PILOT_ADMIN_EMAILS` unset → fail closed (no provisioning access by default).

## Test Coverage Summary

| Workstream | Test type | Key scenarios |
|---|---|---|
| WS_GATEWAY | Unit | 6 routing branches + idempotency |
| WS_DEMO | Unit | 5 routing branches + query failure fallback |
| WS_GUARDS | Unit | guard options, page guards, action guards, parity |
| WS_LANDING | Manual | 3 CTA locations verified |
| WS_E2E | Playwright | auto-bind happy path, idempotency, regression |

## Definition of Done Checklist

Refer to PRD-084 §8 for the full DoD. All items must be checked before merge.
